subject: Poliwag, a small round blue tadpole-like Pokemon with a white belly bearing a prominent black spiral, stub arm-fins, and a curled tail, swimming through blue-green water
description: A small, round, blue tadpole-like creature floats in shallow blue-green water. Its most distinctive feature is the large black spiral pattern on its white underside. Stub fin-like arms extend from its sides and a curled tail trails behind it. The background shows rocky terrain and hints of vegetation, rendered in cool teal and blue tones. The pose is gentle and buoyant, as if drifting rather than actively swimming.
background: Rocky terrain with blue-green water and hints of foliage
